title: CodeGrind: AI Assistant Upgrades and Real-time Scoring Insights
summary: Showcase the latest AI assistant enhancements with problem-solving guidance, multi-model support, and real-time scoring insights to motivate efficient practice.
core_message: CodeGrind now features enhanced Azure OpenAI-powered AI assistant with multiple model options, improved problem-solving guidance, and a revamped scoring system that highlights time, memory, and submission efficiency to help learners optimize their practice.
cta: Explore the updated AI assistant and try a guided problem with real-time feedback today.
visual_brief: Short 15–20s video: screen-capture style showing the AI assistant panel in CodeGrind solving a sample problem, switching between GPT-4o and another model, with on-screen indicators for time, memory, and submissions. Overlay text: 'AI-assisted solving • Real-time scoring • Multi-model support' and brand colors.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
